title: KaitaaCraft
description: A vanilla + performance pack designed for me and my friends
body:
# Modpack Details
### Creators note
This modpack is designed for me and my close friends use. If you happen to stumble upon this page by accident, congrats! But yes, in that case this pack is most likely not meant for you. Feel free to use it nonetheless if you so wish.

### Overview
The modpack adds a list of clientside fabric mods to the game to enhance the vanilla playing experience. Apart from a few mods like [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) and [Elytra Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims), the pack is fully clientside and can be experienced in full on a vanilla server. For said mods it has to be installed on the server as well. The pack also includes multiple shaderpacks and resourcepacks for added benefit.

### Last notes (I like notes)
The pack contains some mods (like [Masady's mods](https://www.curseforge.com/members/masady/projects)) that are disable by default. This is so that some users can toggle them on for themselves (like me).
